info.title: generate-public-api
info.description: This tool generates your public API to a file. You can use this in approval style tests or for documentation.

options.name: --target-frameworks
options.description: Target frameworks to use to restore packages in. Must be a suitable target framework for executables like netcoreapp2.1. It is possible to specify multiple target frameworks like netcoreapp2.1;net461.

options.name: --assembly
options.description: The assembly name including the extension (i.ex. PublicApiGenerator.dll) to generate a public API from in case it differs from the package name.

options.name: --project-path
options.description: The path to the csproj that should be used to build the public API.

options.name: --package
options.description: The package name from which a public API should be created. The tool assumes the package name equals the assembly name. If the assembly name is different specify --assembly.

options.name: --package-version
options.description: The version of the package defined in --package to be used.

options.name: --package-source
options.description: Package source or feed to use (multiple allowed).

options.name: --generator-version
options.description: The version of the PublicApiGenerator package to use. [default: 11.*]

options.name: --working-directory
options.description: The working directory to be used for temporary work artifacts. A temporary directory will be created inside the working directory and deleted once the process is done. If no working directory is specified the users temp directory is used.

options.name: --output-directory
options.description: The output directory where the generated public APIs should be moved.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Prints to stderr detailed information about what's going on behind the scenes.

options.name: --leave-artifacts
options.description: Instructs to leave the temporary artifacts around for debugging and troubleshooting purposes

options.name: --wait-time-in-seconds
options.description: Instructs to leave the temporary artifacts around for debugging and troubleshooting purposes [default: 60]

options.name: --settings-file
options.description: Json file with options in form of ApiGeneratorOptions class
